articles.title: Trump: Islamic State leader killed in joint US-Nigerian mission
articles.description:
He announced the joint operation in Africa’s most populous country in a late-night social media post.

The post Trump: Islamic State leader killed in joint US-Nigerian mission appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US and Nigerian forces killed an Islamic State leader in a joint operation.
Operation announced by Trump on May 16, 2026, via social media.
Boston residents may see increased security measures due to ongoing threats.

articles.title: Maine communities mourn firefighter killed in lumber mill explosion
articles.description:
A memorial of flowers dedicated to 27-year-old Andrew Cross was left outside the Morrill Volunteer Fire Department.

The post Maine communities mourn firefighter killed in lumber mill explosion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine firefighter Andrew Cross, 27, died in a lumber mill explosion.
A memorial was established outside the Morrill Volunteer Fire Department.
Local communities are uniting in grief, impacting regional support for first responders.
